text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Hi. My name is Emma. I'm calling because in the recent update, the government has introduced final expense insurance plans at a highly subsidized rate that you may qualify for. So, check if you qualify, so can you please confirm are you between 40 and 85 years old? Sorry, you don't seem to be qualified for the benefits plans that I have. Thank you for your time.
